driver_subject: vfs: Convert gadgetfs to use the new mount API
stage1_reason: Primary change is conversion from old mount API to new mount API (fs_context), with explicit reference to Documentation/filesystems/mount_api.txt in commit message.
stage2_reason: Driver commit e5d82a7360d1 converts gadgetfs to new mount API, specifically using mount_single/get_tree_single. Kernel commit c23a0bbab30c introduces get_tree_single() helper for new mount API, providing the exact API needed for the driver migration.
